series_metadata.series_description: Documents that indicate when a bank wishes to call a certificate of deposit purchased by the Treasurer prior to its original maturity date. This occurs when a linked deposit program participant repays its bank loan prior to the loan''s original payoff date. The certificate of deposit that is linked to the specific loan is then called by the bank. Supporting documents and emails are also attached to the report.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until conclusion of current fiscal year, and for an additional 4 fiscal years. ; Electronic: Retain until conclusion of current fiscal year, and for an additional 4 fiscal years., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
